title: mentha canadensis var. villosa
intro: Mentha canadensis var. villosa, also known as woolly wild mint, is a subspecies of the wild mint plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues. The health benefits of mentha canadensis var. villosa include reducing nausea and vomiting, easing menstrual cramps, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
